improvement: Added an independent GitHub Actions parity workflow that runs on production deployment workflow, Wrangler configuration, validator, and test changes. It rejects project-name, output-directory, branch-input, and exact-source-commit drift before those changes can be treated as deployment-ready.
claim_limit: The committed workflow makes configuration parity continuously checkable and artifact-producing. No GitHub Actions execution, Cloudflare credential availability, provider deployment, resolving hostname, served surface, or deployed commit was observed in this run.
falsification_route: Change the production workflow project name, pages deploy directory, branch binding, or commit binding and confirm the parity workflow fails; then restore exact parity and confirm a GitHub Actions run produces cloudflare-config-parity.json with accepted=true.
